hero.title: Decentralized Vacation Rentals
hero.subtitle: Book unique stays powered by blockchain. Transparent, secure, and truly peer-to-peer.
hero.search_placeholder: Where do you want to go?

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Experience seamless vacation rentals on the blockchain
how_it_works.step1_desc: Link your Web3 wallet to get started. No email or lengthy sign-up process required.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Discover unique properties and book instantly with cryptocurrency. All transactions are transparent and secure.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Your payment is held in a smart contract escrow until check-in, protecting both travelers and hosts.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Earn Soulbound Tokens (SBTs) for completed stays and reviews, building your on-chain reputation.

why_nomadnodes.title: Why NomadNodes
why_nomadnodes.subtitle: The future of vacation rentals is decentralized
why_nomadnodes.feature1_desc: Direct peer-to-peer transactions mean lower fees and better rates for everyone.
why_nomadnodes.feature2_desc: Your data, reviews, and reputation belong to you through blockchain technology.
why_nomadnodes.feature3_desc: All transactions and reviews are recorded on-chain, ensuring complete transparency.
why_nomadnodes.feature4_desc: Accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies from anywhere in the world.
why_nomadnodes.feature5_desc: Build verifiable on-chain reputation through Soulbound Token achievements.
why_nomadnodes.feature6_desc: Automated payment protection with programmatic dispute resolution.

footer.tagline: The future of vacation rentals is decentralized

onboarding.traveler_desc: Book unique stays worldwide with cryptocurrency
onboarding.host_desc: List your property and earn in crypto
onboarding.both_desc: Travel and host on the same account
onboarding.sbt_explanation: A Soulbound Token (SBT) is your on-chain identity. It's non-transferable and proves your reputation on the platform.
onboarding.sbt_benefits: Your SBT tracks your bookings, reviews, and builds your reputation on-chain. It's required to use the platform.

property_creation.title: Add Your Property
property_creation.subtitle: List your property on the blockchain in just a few steps
property_creation.description_placeholder: Describe your property, what makes it special, nearby attractions...
property_creation.address_privacy: Your exact address will only be shown to confirmed guests
property_creation.no_amenities: No amenities selected. It's okay to add them later!
property_creation.room_types_desc: Configure different room types with their availability and pricing
property_creation.units_help: How many of this room type do you have?
property_creation.photos_desc: Add photos to showcase your property. First photo will be the cover image.
property_creation.file_format: PNG, JPG up to 10MB (for demo, mock images will be added)
property_creation.ipfs_storage: Photos will be stored on IPFS for permanent, decentralized storage
property_creation.review_desc: Review your property details before publishing to the blockchain
property_creation.blockchain_warning: Publishing will create your property as an NFT on the blockchain. This requires a transaction fee and cannot be undone. All room types will be added automatically.
property_creation.confirm_wallet: Please confirm the transaction in your wallet
property_creation.property_live: Your property has been created on-chain and is now live
property_creation.error_name_required: Property name must be at least 5 characters
property_creation.error_description_required: Description must be at least 20 characters
property_creation.error_room_name: Room name must be at least 3 characters
property_creation.error_add_room: Please add at least one room type
property_creation.error_add_photo: Please add at least one photo
